Rythmos® Community Wearable

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Real-time location
Nurse call
Fall detection
Activity tracking

Overview

Rythmos® Community Wearable is a wireless device designed to provide real-time resident location, safety alerts, and activity data within the Rythmos® mesh network.

FUNCTIONS

Provides real-time indoor location data
Enables nurse call via integrated button
Detects falls using onboard accelerometer
Tracks activity and movement patterns

Key Capabilities

Real-Time
Location

Indoor
positioning for faster response

Nurse
Call

One-press
alert to staff

Fall
Detection

Automated
alerts via motion sensing

Activity
Tracking

Step
and movement data

Wander
Management

Proximity-based
monitoring

Access
Integration

Works
with doors and access systems

Hardware Specifications

Battery: CR2430 coin cell (replaceable)
Battery Life: Up to 3 months
Sensor: Accelerometer
Waterproof: Yes
Rating: IP67
Network: Rythmos® Mesh (Wirepas)
Indicator: LED visual indicator
Wear Options: Wrist or neck

System & Safety Features

Real-time alerts to caregivers:

Integration with full Rythmos ecosystem:

Customizable alert logic and thresholds:

Supports infection control and engagement monitoring:

Wireless operation within mesh network:

System Topology — Community Wearable Deployment

Ideal for tracking and monitoring critical assets or individuals throughout the facility. Deploy in accordance with the community's layout to ensure full coverage and reliable alert delivery via the Rythmos® mesh infrastructure.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Wrist band
- Neck pendant

Setup

- Pre-configured for mesh network
- Activated on assignment to resident

Maintenance

- Replace battery as needed
- Monitor status via Care Manager

Usage

- Always worn by resident
- Button accessible for quick alerts

intrexis.com
